title: I Swear
tmdbOverview: Diagnosed with Tourette Syndrome at 15, John Davidson navigates his way against the odds through troubled teenage years and into adulthood, finding inspiration in the kindness of others to discover his true purpose in life.
synopsis: I Swear (2025) is a drama and history film from United Kingdom. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.4 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
